lessons.title: Sous Vide Cooking
lessons.description: Learn the sous vide technique for perfectly cooked meats.
steps: Prepare the sous vide water bath.
Season the meat and vacuum seal it.
Cook the meat in the water bath for the desired time.
Sear the meat for a crispy exterior.
safety_tips: Ensure the water temperature is safe for cooking.
Use appropriate vacuum sealing techniques to avoid contamination.

lessons.title: Fermentation Basics
lessons.description: Understand the basics of fermentation and how to make your own sauerkraut.
steps: Shred the cabbage and mix with salt.
Pack the cabbage tightly in a jar and seal it.
Let it ferment at room temperature for several weeks.
safety_tips: Use clean utensils to avoid introducing harmful bacteria.
Monitor for any signs of spoilage during fermentation.
